title: Eurowrap 15 Piece Kraft Christmas Tag, Ribbon & Bow Gift Wrapping Accessory Set – 100% Recycled Materials – Eco-Friendly Festive Present Decoration Kit
features: ECO-FRIENDLY 15 PIECE SET – Includes ribbons, bows, and tags made from 100% recycled materials for sustainable gift wrapping.
THREE COLOURS OF RAFFIA RIBBON – 10m each of red, white, and red/white mix raffia curling ribbon for versatile wrapping designs.
SIX PRE-STRUNG KRAFT TAGS – Festive printed designs with twisty paper strings, ready to personalise and attach.
SIX BOWS IN TWO SIZES – Four medium (6cm) and two small (2cm) bows in red and kraft to add the perfect finishing touch.
RUSTIC CHRISTMAS STYLE – Complements kraft paper and traditional Christmas wrapping themes beautifully.
description: Give your gifts an extra special touch this festive season with the Eurowrap 15 Piece Kraft Christmas Tag, Ribbon & Bow Gift Wrapping Accessory Set. Designed with a rustic and traditional style, this eco-friendly set contains everything you need to add charm and character to your Christmas presents. The set includes three 10m raffia curling ribbons in red, white, and a red/white mix, perfect for adding colourful finishing touches. Six pre-strung kraft gift tags, printed with festive designs, provide space for personalised messages and come ready to attach with twisty paper string. To complete the look, you’ll also find four medium bows in red and kraft, plus two small bows in matching colours. Made from 100% recycled materials, this set offers a sustainable way to wrap without compromising on style. Ideal for matching with kraft paper gift wrap or complementing other natural Christmas décor, it’s a versatile accessory kit that ensures your presents look beautifully coordinated under the tree. Whether for friends, family, or colleagues, this accessory set makes gift wrapping both effortless and environmentally friendly.
